executives.name: Amanda Lacaze
executives.background: Amanda Lacaze was appointed as Managing Director and Chief Executive Officer of Lynas on 25 June 2014. She has over 35 years of experience in senior operational roles including as CEO of Commander Communications, Executive Chairman of Orion Telecommunications and CEO of AOL|7. Amanda is a Non-Executive Director of the Minerals Council of Australia and a member of the Australian Government’s First Nations Clean Energy Strategy Advisory Group.

tenure_dates.title: Managing Director and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: Gaudenz Sturzenegger
executives.background: Gaudenz Sturzenegger joined Lynas in 2011 and was appointed Chief Financial Officer in 2018. He has extensive experience in financial management, corporate finance, and accounting within the resources sector.

executives.name: Pol Le Roux
executives.background: Pol Le Roux joined Lynas in 2010 and is the Chief Operating Officer. He has over 30 years of experience in the rare earths industry, including senior roles in sales, marketing, and operations.

executives.name: Sarah Leonard
executives.background: Sarah Leonard is the General Counsel and Company Secretary. She joined Lynas in 2021 and has extensive experience in corporate law and governance.

board_of_directors.name: John Humphrey
board_of_directors.background: John Humphrey was appointed as a Non-Executive Director on 15 May 2017 and as Chairman on 30 November 2023. He is a former Executive Dean of the Faculty of Law at Queensland University of Technology and a former Senior Partner of King & Wood Mallesons.

board_of_directors.name: Amanda Lacaze
board_of_directors.background: Managing Director and CEO. See executive profile for details.

board_of_directors.name: Vanessa Guthrie
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Vanessa Guthrie was appointed as a Non-Executive Director on 1 October 2020. She has over 30 years of experience in the mining and energy sectors and is a former CEO of Toro Energy Limited.

board_of_directors.name: Grant Murdoch
board_of_directors.background: Grant Murdoch was appointed as a Non-Executive Director on 30 October 2017. He is a Chartered Accountant and was previously a partner of Ernst & Young and Deloitte.

board_of_directors.name: John Beevers
board_of_directors.background: John Beevers was appointed as a Non-Executive Director on 1 May 2023. He has over 30 years of experience in the resources and chemical industries, including as CEO of Orica Mining Services.
